Shumit.title: Shumit
Shumit.description: One of the pioneers dragged into another world. He raises his hammer and carves a path to return to his home world. By trade, he is a blacksmith who forges gear for the battlefield.
Shumit.cardsModifierDescription: Shumit cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
Shumit.goldMonologue: [sine]Enough iron, and I can forge a road home.[/sine]
Shumit.unlockText: A blacksmith from another world, forging his way home.
